message:
feat: add VIP cache eviction and bounded prefetch pipeline

VIP cache (src/vip-cache.ts):
- LRU with frequency-based eviction protection for footer cache
- Entries accessed >= 3 times become "VIP" and are protected from eviction
- Cold entries evicted first; VIP entries only evicted as last resort (LRU)
- Diagnostics: stats() returns vip/cold counts, /diagnostics shows per-table
  access counts and VIP status
- Replaces plain Map in Query DO footer cache (capacity: 1000 tables)

Bounded prefetch pipeline (src/query-do.ts):
- R2 range fetches fire eagerly with bounded concurrency (max 8 in-flight)
- Coalesced ranges (64KB gap merge) overlap I/O: while fetch N downloads,
  fetches N+1..N+7 are already in-flight
- Aligns with architecture diagram's "fetch page N+1 while WASM processes N"

7 new tests for VIP cache (112 total pass).
